terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Clear and transparent rules for our professional partnership and SaaS subscriptions.

content.0: By commissioning services from Innovayse or subscribing to our SaaS platforms (including SmartLearn and PropSystem), you agree to comply with these professional terms. These rules ensure a secure and efficient environment for all our clients.
content.1: These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you (the Client) and Innovayse Digital Agency regarding all development, marketing, and software hosting services.

content.0: Innovayse delivers high-end web development, mobile applications, technical SEO, and white-label SaaS solutions. We commit to industry standards and best practices in every line of code we write.
content.1: Service specifications, including technical stacks and delivery milestones, are defined in the Project Roadmap/Service Level Agreement (SLA) provided during the onboarding phase.
content.2: We reserve the right to upgrade our SaaS platforms and agency workflows to incorporate new technologies without direct notice, provided such changes do not diminish core functionality.

content.0: Access to our SaaS products and client management portals (WHMCS) requires authentic and verified credentials. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your administrative access.
content.1: Any suspicious activity or unauthorized access must be reported to our support team immediately to prevent potential data breaches or service interruption.

content.0: For custom development: Upon full payment of the project balance, the copyright and intellectual property of the final deliverable (source code/design) are transferred to the Client.
content.1: Innovayse retains the right to use non-sensitive visual elements of the project for its professional portfolio and case studies, unless a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) specifies otherwise.
content.2: For SaaS products: Our platforms are provided under a 'License to Use' model. You may not decompile, reverse engineer, or redistribute our proprietary software code.

content.0: Custom Projects: A 50% commitment fee is usually required to initiate development. Subsequent payments are tied to verified project milestones.
content.1: Hosting & SaaS: Subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis (monthly/yearly). Failure to renew may result in temporary service suspension within 7 days of the due date.
content.2: Taxes: Prices listed on our website are exclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise. All financial transactions are processed through secure, encrypted gateways.

content.0: Termination by Client: You may terminate an ongoing project at any stage; however, previously paid milestone amounts are non-refundable as they cover completed labor.
content.1: Termination by Innovayse: We reserve the right to suspend services in cases of non-payment, violation of ethical guidelines, or use of our platforms for illegal activities.

content.0: Innovayse strives for 99.9% uptime and bug-free releases. However, we are not liable for business losses resulting from third-party API failures, server migrations by external providers, or unapproved client modifications to the source code.
content.1: Our maximum liability for any project is limited to 100% of the fees specifically paid for that component of the service.

content.0: We may refine these terms periodically to align with evolving digital laws and our agency's expansion. Continued use of our services after updates signifies your acceptance.
content.1: Any major shifts in our legal framework will be highlighted in the Client Area of our website.

contact.title: Need Legal Clarification?
contact.description: If you require further details regarding our project contracts or service agreements, our legal team is ready to assist.
